THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 407 ARBALLO DRIVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132 SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76803162)
